Motion To Compel Pltf'S Personal Appearance At Deposition
Off Calendar Aug-12-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jeanette N. Little for defendant and moving party: Piper Kent-Marshall
David W. Ammons Deputy City Attorney for defendant: City and County of San Francisco

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants' motion to compel the attendance of plaintiff at deposition is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to appear in San Francisco, California for deposition before the mandatory September 28, 2005 settlement conference. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to a mutually convenient date, time and place between September 21 to September 26, 2005. The Court finds good cause to permit the deposition of plaintiff less than 30 days before trial. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to conducting any independent physical examination of plaintiff during the same period. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

David W. Ammons Deputy City Attorney for defendant: City and County of San Francisco

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants' motion to compel the attendance of plaintiff at deposition is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to appear in San Francisco, California for deposition before the mandatory September 28, 2005 settlement conference. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to a mutually convenient date, time and place between September 21 to September 26, 2005. The Court finds good cause to permit the deposition of plaintiff less than 30 days before trial. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to conducting any independent physical examination of plaintiff during the same period. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
